query: SELECT li.unitOfMeasure, COUNT(*) as cnt, s.name as supplierName FROM line_items li JOIN supplier_quotes sq ON li.supplierQuoteId = sq.id JOIN suppliers s ON sq.supplierId = s.id WHERE s.name LIKE '%ELECTRA%' OR s.name LIKE '%Prysmian%' OR s.name LIKE '%prysmian%' OR s.name LIKE '%electra%' GROUP BY li.unitOfMeasure, s.name ORDER BY s.name, li.unitOfMeasure;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3ro2tCDef8YTuRV.root --database 89sPt5WznQmH7pHfxEjFRd --execute SELECT li.unitOfMeasure, COUNT(*) as cnt, s.name as supplierName FROM line_items li JOIN supplier_quotes sq ON li.supplierQuoteId = sq.id JOIN suppliers s ON sq.supplierId = s.id WHERE s.name LIKE '%ELECTRA%' OR s.name LIKE '%Prysmian%' OR s.name LIKE '%prysmian%' OR s.name LIKE '%electra%' GROUP BY li.unitOfMeasure, s.name ORDER BY s.name, li.unitOfMeasure;
